description: The Del Mar fragrance by baldessarini for men is aimed at an adult audience with its spicy-woodsy tones. The top notes are mandarin, black pepper and bergamot, with sub-notes of  cedar, cinnamon and cardamom. The base notes comprise vetiver, olibanum, patchouli and ambergris.Quantity: 90 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
